name: Shenyang Cuihua Gold and Silver Jewelry Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenyang Cuihua Gold and Silver Jewelry Co., Ltd. engages in the design, manufacture, wholesale, retail, and franchise of jewelry in China. Its products include gold, platinum, diamonds, jade, etc. The company was formerly known as Shenyang Cuihua Gold and Silver Jewelry Products Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenyang Cuihua Gold and Silver Jewelry Co., Ltd. in July 2008. Shenyang Cuihua Gold and Silver Jewelry Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Shenyang, China.
